overlays.title: SaaS vendor-chain overlay
overlays.focus: Processor, subprocessor, telemetry, support, and customer data chain governance

questions.title: Do you maintain a current processor / subprocessor inventory?
questions.help: Layered dependencies are common in SaaS.

questions.title: Do you understand telemetry, support, and diagnostics data movement?

remediations.action: Build and publish a processor/subprocessor inventory and region map.
Document data-flow assumptions for support, logging, and observability services.
Refresh the inventory and processor chain on a scheduled basis.
